title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Microsoft India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Microsoft India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Ludhiana office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
